form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding by Brillantissime out of Conga on debut. Finished second at Caen in a trial on March 27 over 1954m. Betting will prove to be the best pointer

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding lining up for the second time. At debut 6th over 2400m at Carentan, well beaten by Nitesco De Simm in 2yo race on July 6. Hard to leave out.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Comes here second-up after a week-and-a-half. Lacklustre first-up performance when 9th over 2800m at Chartres well beaten by Neho Cinq in 3yo race on April 5 at $20. Needs to do more. Others better.

form.formComment: Last start disqualified at Lisieux on April 12 over 2725m. Two runs back disqualified at Argentan on March 29 over 2875m. Happy enough to avoid.

form.formComment: Last start was disqualified at Vire on March 18 over 2700m. Performed better the start before with a game effort when 3rd over 2825m at Le Crois?-Laroche, beaten 15m by Nativity Quick in 3yo fillies race on March 7 at $11. Has the right credentials to take this out.

form.formComment: Last start 5th over 2750m at Ecommoy beaten 10m by Nounka Elte in 3yo fillies race on April 6. Two runs back 6th over 2925m at Cagnes-sur-Mer beaten 79m by Neuro Bella in 3yo fillies race on January 31 at $23. One of the better hopes.

form.formComment: Last start by 40m at Les Andelys beating No Name in 3yo colts and gelding claiming R on April 5. No surprise if he made it two in a row.

form.formComment: Finished up last campaign with a win at Agen, started this campaign disqualified at Reims on March 19 over 2550m. Then last time 4th over 2875m at Meslay-du-Maine, beaten 41m by Navy Madrik in 3yo claiming on April 4 at $8.80. Not likely to trouble these.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 1.3m second behind Navy Madrik at Meslay-du-Maine over 2875m 3yo claiming last start. Before that was beaten 0.0L second at Bihorel Les Rouen over 2500m in 3yo claiming R on March 8. Racing well and worth each-way consideration.
